title: I love who I am becoming
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for honouring the ongoing transformation toward a wealthy identity.
excerpt: A short affirmation practice from Day 28 of the MONEY program. Use to acknowledge the shift that is already underway, not who you will be, but who you are becoming right now.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 28 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: An affirmation from Day 28 of the MONEY program. The word "becoming" is specific: this is not a finished claim about who you already are, but a statement of love for the process of change. You don't need to have arrived. The becoming itself is worth celebrating.
I love who I am becoming.

Say it out loud three times, hand on heart. If you notice resistance (a sense that you haven't changed enough yet, or that loving yourself while still in progress feels premature), that's the part to stay with.
Adapted from Day 28 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
